title: Non-record: MLX smoke test on MacBook Air M3 — val_bpb 2.3029
author: Rhoahndur

data.description: Tied input and output embeddings in the baseline GPT model.
Used grouped query attention with fewer KV heads than attention heads.

novel_contributions: Baseline MLX smoke test on a MacBook Air M3
Validated the training pipeline locally before scaling to H100 infrastructure
Produced a compressed artifact under the 16 MB limit
